title: Beginner learners
subtitle: Introductory article pathway
description: Readers who need orientation before comparing audience frameworks
recommended_action: Add evidence, clarify positioning, or review exclusion/stereotype risk.

title: Technical practitioners
subtitle: Technical workflow pathway
description: Practitioners who need reusable scoring and governance workflows
primary_job: Apply STP to structured content and product communication
recommended_action: Keep active and review during the next governance cycle.

title: Public policy stakeholders
subtitle: Public reasoning pathway
description: Policy and civic audiences needing responsible segmentation and positioning

governance.reasons: moderate positioning gap; exclusion-risk review; status marked review

recommended_action: Add evidence, clarify positioning, or review exclusion/stereotype risk.

title: Affected stakeholders
subtitle: Ethics pathway
description: People indirectly affected by targeting or positioning decisions
primary_job: Check whether targeting creates exclusion or burden

governance.reasons: moderate positioning gap; weak differentiation; exclusion-risk review; status marked review

recommended_action: Revise positioning, evidence support, and ethical framing before reuse.

title: Institutional sponsors
subtitle: Strategy pathway
description: Leaders evaluating whether the article supports strategic communication
primary_job: Assess relevance to institutional message architecture
recommended_action: Keep active and review during the next governance cycle.

title: Generic audience label
subtitle: Revision pathway
description: A weak broad audience label included to test validation and governance flags
primary_job: Reveal why vague segmentation weakens communication

governance.reasons: weak evidence fit; weak category clarity; weak differentiation; stereotype-risk review; exclusion-risk review; status marked revise

recommended_action: Revise positioning, evidence support, and ethical framing before reuse.
